policies: Assignments submitted after the posted deadline may receive reduced credit unless prior arrangements were approved.
Attendance is expected because the course relies on in-class review, structured discussion, and periodic short exercises.
Course updates will be shared through the usual classroom channel and should be reviewed before each meeting.
Readings should be completed before class so that lecture time can focus on examples, questions, and applied practice.
Students are encouraged to ask for clarification early if any grading or participation expectation is unclear.
